prompt.content:
Use the data center survey. 

For each competitor, what is the number of respondents whose Switching Likelihood is 3 or higher that lists that competitor as the best in-class competitor? Also, refer to the attached note on calculating NPS.

What is the simple average adjusted NPS for each of the following filters?
-Switching Likelihood equals 3 or higher 
-Average data needs (in TB) is Between 500 and 1,000 Terabytes
-Average monthly cost is at least $100 kW/month

Give me your final answers as a message in the console, rounded to the nearest whole number.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Best-In-Class Competitor
CyrusOne: 2
Digital Realty Trust: 11
Equinix: 2 
Iron Mountain: 12
Other: 3

The average adjusted NPS for respondents with a Switching Likelihood that equals 3 or higher is 54
The average adjusted NPS for respondents with average data needs (in TB) is Between 500 and 1,000 Terabytes is 50
The average adjusted NPS for respondents with an average monthly cost that is at least $100 kW/month or more is 49
